Alfred_

AI Chief of Staff that automates email, calendar, and task management.

Category AI Agents
Pricing $24.99/mo
Released 2024
Affiliate Varies
Visit Alfred_ →

About Alfred_

Alfred_ (get-alfred.ai) is an AI Chief of Staff or AI Executive Assistant designed to autonomously manage email, calendar, and tasks for founders, consultants, and executives. It operates 24/7 in the background, learning user preferences and communication patterns to provide a prioritized Daily Brief each morning.

Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • Comprehensive coverage of chief of staff coordination tasks
  • Saves 5-8 hours per week on administrative work
  • 24/7 autonomous operation
  • Learns user preferences and communication patterns
  • Secure OAuth 2.0 integration with Gmail and Outlook
  • 30-day free trial without credit card
  • Affordable alternative to human Chief of Staff

❌ Cons

  • Not for strategic judgment or complex decisions
  • Requires initial setup and training period
  • Primarily valuable for email/calendar heavy users
  • May occasionally over-prioritize or misjudge urgency
  • Limited integrations beyond Gmail/Outlook

Best For

Solopreneurs and executives who spend 2+ hours daily on email, scheduling, and administrative tasks.

Tags

ai agentsautomationproductivityexecutive assistant
